method: 3 independent general-purpose sub-agent judges, name+description only, 20 adversarial near-miss queries, majority vote

should_not_trigger.note: all 10 correctly NOT triggered (0/30), incl. hardest: #15 MySQL index, #16 JV-Link download, #19 generic COM, #20 live race values

conclusion: Description is robust under adversarial stress: 100% accuracy on hard near-misses with no false positives and no false negatives. No description change is warranted; finalize the current description as-is.
